review_title: Authorized to use authorize.net
description: I feel that my overall experience with authorize.net has been positive. When I first began using this product, I needed some customer support on an issue and they were so quick to respond and they let me know that they would be available 24/7 to help with any other questions that I may have. You can't beat customer service like that.
author: Katrina H.
pros: I like that I am not held to a contract if it didn't work as I expected. Luckily, it works just as I need it to but that was a big factor in using authorize.net. I am glad I made that investment
cons: I think having to pay a monthly gateway fee is a con but not enough of a con to keep me from using this service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Used for over 10 years!
description: We enjoyed using them - always great customer service and issues resolved - money was always transferred to the bank account and account managing and log in were easy to use!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We were able to intergrade with our software at a cheaper rate. Easy log in and easy to run reports for members and sales.
cons: We were unable to charge 3% to the customer for online transactions. We did incur a monthly gateway fee plus multiple other fees monthly - we were pci compliment but yet still got charged on the statement

review_title: Authorize is a handy tool
description: It's been fine, it does what it sets out to do but I don't consider it to be ground breaking. It does seem to have security figured out which is a nice plus.
author: Dana M.
pros: Authorize helps us securely capture payment from customers on our eCommerce customer facing site that is a partnership with our fulfillment business. It is easier to use than our home grown software for the end user for sure.
cons: We need separate accounts for US and Canadian payments. This means that we have to log in and out depending on the ship destination. It's also not the most user friendly on the back end.

review_title: Secure online payments and transfers for export operations.
description: With this, our team is able to process safe payments and manage accounts with fewer errors, bringing more speed and confidence to our export operations.
author: Jason C.
pros: Authorize.net gives us strong security for global transactions, plus simple account management and clear fees. The transferring of money to clients and partners is highly reliable; it assists in avoiding fraud issues.
cons: Account settings and updating staff permissions took some getting used to when dealing with a bigger team. Managing fees and multiple accounts is confusing at first.

review_title: Good Stripe alternative for Woocommerce
description: Good! With the good rates, and integration by SkyVerge for WooCommerce I can definitely recommend authorize.net
author: Hilary T.
pros: API access is great and there are paid plugins that make integrating with WooCommerce very easy. The also have low fees
cons: Their merchant UI is very outdated. It’s hard to find things and it’s small and hard to read sometimes. Looks like it was built in the 90s and never updated.

review_title: Enabled us to create slick and professional invoices.
description: It eased up our credit card processing, time for transaction and manual mistakes became less. We now do our monthly books in less time and with better results.
author: Connor T. B.
pros: The thing I love about it is how easy Authorize. net checks in with our invoicing software. It is dependable for customer payments, especially recurring billing for long-term B2B customers. The fraud detection tools also provide peace of mind.
cons: The interface feels a little dated, and reporting tools could be more user-friendly. It can be a little time consuming to make custom financial summaries sometimes.

review_title: Property Management and Authorize
description: Overall the experience is the system is not only cost effective but has greatly helped with money transfers and being able to account for them.
author: Dru S.
pros: Very streamlined service for payment confirmation and authorization. Highly recommended for property management to ensure all payment details are securely kept in a centralized location.
cons: The interface can be a bit outdated at times and requested system updates are not as quick as we would like. Can be a bit of a learning curve in the beginning due to the interface.

review_title: Choose Authorize.net if your looking for the best out!
description: I am so glad I found Authorize.net not only was it the most cost effective but customer service is Quick with clear problem solving solutions.
author: Nicole E.
pros: Authorize.Net has a homepage where I can easily view all my transactions along with a breakdown of each one.
cons: I have no dislikes with authorize.net I’ve been using them going on 5years and I have made many calls to them with questions, comments and concerns.

review_title: Top class for USA payment solutions
description: Authorise.net is so powerful that even their resellers built top class payment solutions for end users like me who have clients that want to use authorise.net to access USA payments.
author: Babatunde O.
pros: Ease of integrating USA based payments through their reseller paysafe which allowed us eChecks payment as the business was expanding to USA
cons: It was not easy at first to get through to paysafe as a business operating in Europe we had to go through a reseller who then answered all our questions.

review_title: If you are not a desinger
description: that my experience is not good at all there was alot of problmes
author: sean S.
pros: The system is okay but if you are not a designer then you would not really know what to do
cons: not for every company that is looking to sell online

review_title: THE Standard in the industry of processing
description: It was easy to start and requires no maintenance to continue running.
author: Joseph V.
pros: Authorize has been the easiest to use with no changes. They pass the test of time.
cons: No cons whatsoever. They are flawless in operation.

review_title: This system is Ok
author: Tammy F.
pros: That you can go in and search specifically by name on someone who has paid
cons: It was confusing once we were switching over companies. We cancelled and they are still charging us for it

review_title: Works Great 100% Of The Time
description: I use Authorize.net to handle my e-commerce transaction payments . It works great.
author: Carleton T.
pros: It's basically a 100% trust symbol, and I know it's going to work every time, while protecting my transactions.
cons: I guess I don't like when I need a secret key AND a security token and a few other things, since it just seems excessive.

review_title: Worked great for us!!
description: Overall the whole integration process was smooth. The management portal is pretty intuitive.
author: Adeel S.
pros: The integration was smooth and easy with all the documentation for direct web integration.
cons: The developer documentation around API was not that detailed. Had to reference other sources on internet.

review_title: AUTHORIZENET IS A MUST HAVE
description: OVERALL IT IS A GREAT WAY OF SETTING UP PAYMENT ARRANGEMENTS WITHOUT CONSTANT REMINDERS. I LOVE THE EASE OF GAINING CLEARED AND DECLINED PAYMENTS.
author: Vanessa C.
pros: INSTANT PAYMENT INFORMATION. DECLINED AND ACCEPTED WITHOUT HAVING TO TAKE THE TIME TO PROCESS EACH PAYMENT.
cons: LOG IN CAN BE DAUNTING. I HAVE TO MAKE SURE MY EMAIL IS UP TO RECEIVE A CODE EVERYTIME I SIGN IN. I UNDERSTAND WHY BUT, IT CAN BE A HASSLE

review_title: Simple for clients
author: Latisha C.
pros: I like that It was easy to use to set up to use.
cons: I’m still new to using it so ok so far!’
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Authorize.net is controling of financial transactions
description: as an accountant Iam a user of Authorized.net for the controlling and identify the error while doing the payments
author: Santhosh Kumar K.
pros: In Authorize.net I like mostly it is useful for merchants and vendors for controlling the payments of their customers. It is very secured software and we can control fraudulent transactions.
cons: Authorized.net need to implementation on cutomer id with recrring card details removing if it is impelmented it will helpfull to many vendors like us so we can easily identify the error while doing the transactions

review_title: Holds Funds like PayPal Does - Avoid.
description: I'm not saying that Authorize.net does not work for everybody. But the digital marketer is in particular I would steer clear because it has the same issues that PayPal exhibits were sometimes a hold your funds for no reason and you have to fight to get them. Youre flagged as high risk I was a customer with Authorize.net for about three months and I was approved for ACH bank transfers by their credit team. I put two of them through and all of a sudden my bank transfer account was shut down and they didn't tell me why other than my account was deemed high-risk by their bank and no matter what I did it would never be reopened ever. To my knowledge the only thing that makes it high-risk is that I charged about $5k in two days - Which I told the underwriter team was my norm before I signed up. They knew how much money I would be processing each month. They also told me that my business model wasn't elibigile for bank transfers. My clients couldn't even ask for a refund. All they could do was dispute the charges that were on hold and if they did that it would hurt my account and my credit. To this day they still have about $4400 of my money that I will not get until the end of January if my account is in good standing. Well I shut down the account and moved over to QuickBooks so hopefully I get paid. Again I'm doing recurring bank transfers with my client so this might not be the case for everybody and this might be great for credit card transactions.
author: Jay M.
pros: It was very easy to set up recurring payments and sync with my webmaster.
cons: - The UI is extremely outdated and looks like it's from the early 2000s. - Your invoices are not customizable and they look tacky - Navigating around the menu is not user-friendly as finding where you're trying to go and can be difficult - Customer support is not the greatest and sometimes I can't help you with your problems or get back to you in a timely matter
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's been great for our business
description: Authorize.net has been super simple and straight forward to use. I've been able to cancel a charge that was made in error before it even hit a card. I get full details of who is purchasing and how much. I can look up transactions easily. It's been a great second backup system for us as far as credit card records. It's been very easy to implement on our website and we've been very happy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I have loved using Authorize.net. Often I have to go back thru our credit card records to check how much was charged or how much was refunded. It's great to be able to look up via credit card number or names. Customer service has always been excellent whenever I've needed to contact them. I also like that I'm able to run reports of all of our transactions when I'm trying to compartmentalized different amounts and categories. It works well with our registration system.
cons: I wish that we were able to issue refunds after the 3 month period. I know we can lose some of our security measures to allow our system to automatically refund but we don't want to do that. Instead we take the cc number and manually enter it into a different refund system for those return that are past 3 months. I think the security issue is a mandated issue and there is not much Authorize can do. I do wish the downloads went to a simpler to read excel format but I tend to take the CSV file and do what I need to do to make it work.

review_title: AUTHORIZE FOR NON PROFIT DONATION MANAGEMENT/PROCESSING
description: Customer service and adaptability of the system with our CRM has been very positive for us. When we adopted our new CRM system along with the the hosted website managed by the same CRM system, we were not sure how everything would integrate, but our donation links and sponsorship links that take contributors directly to Authorize for processing have never let us down.
author: Kenneth M.
pros: Authorize integrated flawlessly with our CRM system. It was one of several options for donor management and processing that was compatable with our CRM. We researched each available system and Authorize was both suggested by a fellow non profit as well as seemed to meet our requirements.
cons: Transaction charges seem to be the biggest issue that we have. There are industry averages for processing various cards, and Authorize is on par with other systems. It is unfortunate that Authorize does not offer a non-profit processing rate or possibly a flat rate that is well below what would be offered to a for profit organization.

review_title: authorize.net: A Reliable Visa Solution
author: Carla M.
pros: This visa solution has been reliable and easy to use. authorize.net has great capabilities.
cons: I like all the features of authorize.net. No dislikes for authorize.net.

review_title: A wonderful way to process payments
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This software makes it so easy to process payments. It was very easy for us to build the bridge between our main software and authorize.net to process all payments through them. The website requires no training and doesn't have a million options of choices to pick from like some do- everything is very self explanatory! Their customer service is great and gets back to you quickly.
cons: I don't have many complaints about Authorize.net except the reports. They are very confusing and it is hard to know which report you are supposed to be using and when. They don't provide a great description of each report.

review_title: We've relied on Authorize.Net for over 10 years
description: We've used Authorize.Net with our website shopping cart for over 10 years. Along with that, we've used the virtual terminal for manually keying phone / mail orders. It is easier to use than PayPal Manager.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Authorize.Net provides good, helpful API documentation. Its web-based virtual terminal is also easy to use.
cons: I would give their support a grade of B. Fortunately, it is rarely needed. A few years back, there were some rough patches where the service was down or unreliable for brief periods. We have not had reliability problems for the last few years.

review_title: The payment gateway we've preferred for ecommerce development projects
description: Reliable and trusted payment processing
author: Bryan M.
pros: Authorize.net is the standard in payment processing. For a complex and established ecommerce website, Authorize.net will offer the features needed and provides a trusted payment solution. Processing fees will be lower than competition like Stripe which larger volume businesses will benefit from.
cons: The interface, lack of reporting, and complexity in setup is an issue for us in 2018 when options like Stripe can be setup and running in a few hours vs days with Authorize.net

review_title: Authorize payments with Authorize
description: Extremely user friendly. Easy to use and has features we do not use yet but as a growing company love knowing the features are available as we neef
author: Jill R.
pros: The ease of intro into our company and ease of use.
cons: Can only capture 20 payments at a time at the end of the day
